name: Stonehouse
overview: Drama following the life and times of disgraced Labour politician John Stonehouse, a high-flying minister under Prime Minister Harold Wilson’s government vanished from the beach of a large luxury hotel in Florida in November 1974, leaving a neatly folded pile of clothes as he swam into the sea, intent on faking his own death.

trailers.title: Stonehouse | Stream Free From 2nd Jan | ITV
Stonehouse: Behind The Scenes | Matthew & Keeley | BritBox
